summary: Adjusted the opening construction so Chapter 8 enters in the present driveway moment instead of sharing Chapter 9's quantified retrospective scaffold; left the rest of the chapter intact because the exit already hands off cleanly to the next chapter's foil-package image.
edits: Reframed the opening to start with Doug in the driveway at 6:52 p.m. before folding in the prior-visit count.
Removed the separate 'Now there was a fifth time' beat by absorbing that information into the revised opening paragraph.
